creator: iang@uunet.co.za
text:
When the system is rebooted by a shutdown, reboot or control-alt-delete,
it reports a 'Page fault in kernel mode' with the following
information:

Stack:	0x10:0xefbffe54
Frame:	0x10:0xefbffe5c
IP:	0x8:0x0

The current process is either reboot from a shutdown or reboot or
init for the control-alt-delete boot.

Fix: 

unknow
How-To-Repeat: 
shutdown -r +2
